content.description: Full markdown body to store. Replaces the file's content entirely — prefer the append endpoint to add a section without clobbering concurrent edits.

expected_version.description: Compare-and-set token. Omit (or null) to create a new file; pass the version you last read to update an existing one. A mismatch returns 409 — re-read and merge before retrying.

path.description: Relative path of the file to write, e.g. 'project.md' or 'users/jane-doe.md'. Must end in '.md', may not contain '..' or absolute segments.

updated_by_run.description: Optional identifier of the agent run performing this write (e.g. a scout run UUID), recorded for attribution. Omit for human/API writes; the writer's user is attributed automatically.
